patch.value: pm templates bare command shows empty output (should list templates)

Running pm templates without a subcommand produces empty stdout and exit 0. Agents expecting to see a list of templates find nothing. Should default to pm templates list behavior. Fixed by adding an .action() handler to the templates command in main.ts that calls runTemplatesList.
Added default .action() handler to templatesCommand in main.ts that calls runTemplatesList. pm templates now outputs template list (empty set or available templates).
Fixed in main.ts: templates bare command now defaults to runTemplatesList output.

author: cursor-agent

patch.value: Expected closure outcome: Fixed in main.ts: templates bare command now defaults to runTemplatesList output.
Actual closure outcome: Fixed in main.ts: templates bare command now defaults to runTemplatesList output.
